market_pulse: Competitive DJ lineups dominate weekend programming across luxury venues; LIV Beach maintains strong May momentum with Sommer Ray (5/8) and David Guetta (5/30) anchoring dayclub calendar while nightclubs spotlight emerging talent and Latin Sundays.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA driving Latin-focused content (#deseolatinsundays) with established following while LIV not leveraging this high-engagement segment
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch themed Latin night series or partner with regional Latin artists for May/June programming push

content_gaps.description: LIV Beach Sunday Circuit (fitness/recovery blend) detected but minimal social storytelling compared to competitors' lifestyle content
content_gaps.suggested_action: Amplify Sunday Circuit content with before/after wellness clips, creator partnerships for fitness influencers

content_gaps.description: Competitors seeing strong TikTok engagement around venue aesthetics (chandeliers, pool views, rooftop scenes) while LIV social largely promotion-focused
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create shareable moment framework - encourage venue selfies with custom hashtags, feature user clips on official channels
